<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="oG_ZevKRk-icumImNwf5" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-143" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="400" background="#fbfaf7" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="none"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="lblA" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="MCP CLIENT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="40" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#5d665d;dashed=1;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="AI assistant
Claude · IDE agents" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="170" x="40" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lblB" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="YOUR TRANSPORT — SCAFFOLDED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="300" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5d665d;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="tools/mcp-gateway.py
reference HTTP transport
(stdlib http.server)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="300" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#0f766e;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=4" value="POSTGRESQL — YOUR DEPLOYED APPLICATION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="360" x="580" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9f4e8;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="api.mcp_handle_request(request, context)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="610" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="handler registry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="300" x="610" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#172018;fontSize=12" value="tools · resources · prompts
(your SQL handlers)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="610" y="254" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="cli" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;strokeColor=#143d2b;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="gw" value="HTTP
JSON-RPC 2.0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-12" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="gw" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#fbfaf7;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5" target="hr" value="SQL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-12" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="hr" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#5d665d;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="reg" value="dispatches by method"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="reg" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#0f766e;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0" target="trp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=12;fontColor=#5d665d;" value="the advanced-template HTTP gateway — separate from the core CLI's pgmi serve stdio server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="980" y="368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
